name: Ikarie
description: Stereo twin-core 12dB/oct state-variable filter with continuous LP↔HP cutoff, envelope follower, stereo VCA, and BEYOND difference output. Designed by Casper Electronics × Bastl.

controls.name: CUTOFF
controls.description: Large knob sweeps continuously from LP (CCW) through open (noon) to HP (CW). Controls both filter cores in sync.

controls.name: RESONANCE
controls.description: Fader for filter Q. Self-oscillates as sine at max with no input. Becomes attenuator for RESONANCE CV when cable inserted.

controls.name: MOD
controls.description: Attenuverter for the MOD CV input feeding both filters' cutoff in tandem. Normalled from FOLLOW output when MOD unpatched.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

controls.name: STEREO
controls.description: Controls stereo behavior per switch setting: detunes left/right cutoff (SPREAD) or pans between left/right filter levels (PAN). Becomes attenuator when STEREO jack patched.

controls.name: STEREO switch
controls.description: Selects PAN (balance L/R VCA levels) or SPREAD (detune L/R cutoff frequencies).

controls.name: INPUT
controls.description: Pre-filter gain from 0x to 5x. Drives the filter to overdrive at high settings; also sets amplitude feeding the FOLLOW envelope.

controls.name: FOLLOW switch
controls.description: Envelope follower response speed — SLOW (natural release, pumping), MID (tight, balanced), FAST (near full-wave rectifier, per-cycle modulation).

inputs.name: L IN
inputs.description: Left filter input. Normalled to R IN for dual-mono operation.

inputs.name: R IN
inputs.description: Right filter input. Accepts independent signal; otherwise sees L IN via normalling.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: Second modulation input added to cutoff. 1V = one octave shift (calibratable via front-panel trimmer).

inputs.name: MOD
inputs.description: Main cutoff modulation input, attenuverted by MOD knob. Normalled from FOLLOW output for built-in auto-wah.

inputs.name: STEREO
inputs.description: CV for the stereo parameter (spread or pan). Converts STEREO knob into an attenuator when patched.

inputs.name: RESONANCE
inputs.description: CV for resonance. Turns RESONANCE fader into a cap on the modulation range when patched.

inputs.name: VCA CV
inputs.description: Positive CV opens both output VCAs simultaneously. Silent with no CV patched.

outputs.name: L OUT (MONO)
outputs.description: Left filter output. Sums L + R when R OUT is unpatched — use alone for mono.

outputs.name: R OUT
outputs.description: Right filter output. Splits the stereo image when patched (disables the mono sum on L OUT).

outputs.name: BEYOND
outputs.description: Difference spectrum between the two filters — a band-pass between left and right cutoff frequencies (twin peak filter).

outputs.name: FOLLOW
outputs.description: Envelope follower CV tracking INPUT signal loudness. Response set by FOLLOW switch. Normalled to MOD input.

behaviors.name: Continuous LP↔HP morphing
behaviors.description: CCW half sweeps a low-pass from closed to open; CW half sweeps a high-pass from open to closed. A single knob morphs between filter types without a mode switch — great for unified tonal gestures.

behaviors.name: Built-in auto-wah
behaviors.description: FOLLOW output is internally normalled to MOD input. Any signal at INPUT modulates its own cutoff — classic envelope-follower filter effect with no external envelope needed. FOLLOW switch chooses response time.

behaviors.name: Twin peak filter (BEYOND)
behaviors.trigger: use BEYOND output with STEREO in SPREAD
behaviors.description: BEYOND takes the difference of L and R filter outputs — when cutoffs are detuned via SPREAD, yields a band-pass sitting between the two peaks. Add resonance for dual-formant vocal timbres.

behaviors.name: Mono dual-peak formant
behaviors.trigger: use L OUT only with STEREO in SPREAD
behaviors.description: L OUT sums both filter outputs. With STEREO spreading cutoff, creates two simultaneous resonant peaks — formant filtering from a mono signal with no external routing.

behaviors.name: Series 24dB filtering
behaviors.trigger: patch L OUT → R IN, listen to R OUT
behaviors.description: Chains the two 12dB filter cores in series for a 24dB/oct steep response. Stereo behavior is lost, but cutoff attenuation doubles. Add INPUT gain or SPREAD for aggressive serial distortion.

behaviors.name: Pinged percussion
behaviors.trigger: trigger/noise burst to L IN, RESONANCE high
behaviors.description: High resonance plus a transient at INPUT excites the filter as a percussive voice. Use BEYOND or MOD in SPREAD for metallic tones. FOLLOW → VCA CV gates the burst's decay automatically.

behaviors.name: Audio-rate stereo ring mod
behaviors.trigger: audio at STEREO input, PAN mode, listen BEYOND
behaviors.description: In PAN mode, the STEREO knob crossfades between L and R filter outputs. Modulating at audio rate with STEREO jack patched and listening on BEYOND yields ring-modulated tones — the difference cancels the shared spectrum.

behaviors.name: External feedback
behaviors.trigger: patch L OUT or R OUT back into L IN or R IN
behaviors.description: Creates exaggerated resonance / feedback beyond internal RESONANCE range. INPUT knob caps the gain — careful scaling produces chaotic pinged drones or unstable tones.

behaviors.name: VCA normally silent
behaviors.description: The output stereo VCA defaults to open (normal filter level) when VCA CV has nothing plugged in. Patching 0V there mutes output — use positive CV (env, LFO) to sculpt amplitude without external VCA.

patchIdeas.name: Auto-wah guitar in
patchIdeas.patch: leave MOD unpatched · FOLLOW switch MID · INPUT high · send guitar or drum loop through L IN · filter tracks envelope automatically · adjust MOD knob for depth and direction
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* FOLLOW: MID
* INPUT: 4 o'clock
* MOD: 1 o'clock
* CUTOFF: noon

- External (Out) -> Ikarie (L IN)
- Ikarie (L OUT) -> Output (L)
- Ikarie (R OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Formant vocal filter
patchIdeas.patch: mono signal to L IN · STEREO switch SPREAD · STEREO knob ~2 o'clock · RESONANCE high · listen L OUT only · sweeping CUTOFF yields throaty formant sweep
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* STEREO switch: SPREAD
* STEREO: ~2 o'clock
* RESONANCE: 75%

VCO:
LFO:

- VCO (Saw) -> Ikarie (L IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Ikarie (MOD)
- Ikarie (L OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Twin peak stereo drone
patchIdeas.patch: noise into L IN · STEREO SPREAD wide · L OUT to left · BEYOND to right · creates disorienting stereo image with sum on one side, difference on the other
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* STEREO switch: SPREAD
* STEREO: full
* RESONANCE: 80%

Noise:
LFO:

- Noise (Out) -> Ikarie (L IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Ikarie (MOD)
- Ikarie (L OUT) -> Output (L)
- Ikarie (BEYOND) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Pinged snare
patchIdeas.patch: trigger burst to L IN · INPUT 3 o'clock · RESONANCE max · FOLLOW fast · FOLLOW → VCA CV · BEYOND gives metallic ring · self-contained percussion voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* RESONANCE: max
* FOLLOW: FAST
* STEREO switch: SPREAD
* STEREO: ~1 o'clock

Clock:

- Clock (Out) t> Ikarie (L IN) // trigger as audio
- Ikarie (FOLLOW) >> Ikarie (VCA CV)
- Ikarie (BEYOND) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Serial 24dB acid bass
patchIdeas.patch: L OUT into R IN · listen R OUT · RESONANCE high · envelope to MOD · INPUT drive for overdrive · steep saturated bass with classic 24dB character
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* INPUT: 4 o'clock
* RESONANCE: 70%

VCO:
Envelope:

- VCO (Saw) -> Ikarie (L IN)
- Ikarie (L OUT) -> Ikarie (R IN) // series
- Envelope (Out) >> Ikarie (MOD)
- Ikarie (R OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo VCA gate
patchIdeas.patch: stereo pair from external to L IN / R IN · envelope to VCA CV only · CUTOFF open · use Ikarie as stereo VCA with optional filter coloring
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ikarie:
* CUTOFF: noon (open)
* RESONANCE: 0

Envelope:

- External (L) -> Ikarie (L IN)
- External (R) -> Ikarie (R IN)
- Envelope (Out) >> Ikarie (VCA CV)
- Ikarie (L OUT) -> Output (L)
- Ikarie (R OUT) -> Output (R)
